meaning: n.娣辫皨杩滆檻,澶╂剰,涓婂笣,绁炵殑鐪烽【
examples: How far is Pawtucket from Providence?
When the Fisherman pulled the net out of the sea, he cried out joyfully: "Blessed Providence!"
Providence chief executive Tony O'Reilly Jr said this was the beginning of an Irish oil industry.
Portuguese women hug him like a son as he works a crowd in East Providence.
